analysis_commentary: Improved on GOAL-1B: last_probe max_prob=0.122 vs baseline 0.14 (-13%); 10-min max_prob=0.118 — meaningful improvement in policy concentration, the more directly goal-aligned axis. legal_mass=0.545 (vs 0.597 baseline, within noise). pEnt healthy 6.75-6.83. 538 steps, 1 arena, no promotion. The historical accept direction (replay_min 250k→100k→80k) extends — 75k continues the pattern.
